content.title:
Welcome to ZARK Gaming
ASA 3x Cluster
content.text:
Oi, Survivors!

Welcome to ZARK Gaming ASA 3x.

Experience ARK the way it was meant to be played:
Balanced progression.
Meaningful breeding.
Long-term survival.

We're a friendly South African community focused on delivering a relaxed PvE experience without the drama, griefing, or unnecessary admin interference.

Before you charge off punching trees and annoying dodos, take a moment to visit the Server Info and Rules & Support pages.

Need help?
Need clarification?
Need to report something suspicious?

Our admin team is only a Discord ticket away.

Highlights:

• 3x Harvesting Rates
• 220 Max Wild Dino Level
• No Gameplay Mods
• Active Administration
• Cross-Cluster Community

Join our Discord for full rules, support, updates and community events.

Now grab your pickaxe, tame something dangerous, and try not to become dinosaur food.

content.title: Rules Page 1
content.text:
- Be respectful: Any harassment, hate speech, toxic behavior or prejudiced comments of any kind, including sexism, racism, ageism, or homophobia / are not allowed.
- No griefing: This includes, but not limited to foundation spamming, blocking resources, or trolling players.
- No cheating: No exploiting glitches, bugs, or unintended mechanics.
- Keep it clean: Tribe, player, dino & Steam names must follow PEGI 12 / ESRB Teen standards. We recommend keeping your in-game and Discord name the same. No duplicate player names / first come, first serve.
- Keep it fair: Helping new players is welcome, but don’t spoil the game. No giving away high-level gear or dinos (e.g. Argy or higher). Giving OP dinos (250+ stats) may lead to a wipe or ban. Fair trades only.
- Keep it consistent: Keep tribe names the same across the cluster, this is to help you in the event of a character corruption or any restore functions.
- Build away from all key locations (e.g., obelisks, caves with artifacts, rare resource spawns and character spawns).
- One main base per tribe, plus one outpost (e.g., farming or taming base).
- No excessive land claiming, structures that go unused will be removed by Admins.
- Keep bases optimized, limit unnecessary spam structures to reduce lag.
- Do not build Vacuum Pods, they cause lag, map & character corruption (these will be removed by Admins without warning).
- Do not block or cage high-level wild creatures for extended periods.
- Keep breeding reasonable because it causes excessive dino hoarding and lag.
- Any unwanted dinos should be responsibly disposed of.
- Do not block or monopolize high-value resources (metal, crystal, oil, etc.).
- No killing passive creatures that belong to other players.
- Be mindful of community areas (such as teleporters, marketplaces, or public utilities).

These are only the highlights of our rules. See detailed rules at #Rules on our Discord channel below. By continuing, you acknowledge you have read and understand all rules.

content.title: Rules Page 2
content.text:
- Trade fairly, avoid sharing high-value items with new players.
- Help new players by offering guidance, not just free items.
- Report any exploits to Admins.
- Respect Admin decisions, do not spam complaints or harass staff.
- Support is offered on a best-effort-basis. Our Admins typically work during the day, but will be able to assist in the evenings or weekends.
- Use the Discord ticket system (#tickets) for issues and bug reports.
- Cheating, exploiting, or abusing mechanics will result in immediate action.
- No AFK farming, excessive auto-clicking, or macro abuse.
- Automated farms (e.g. gachas, dung beetles & seed farms) are allowed.
- Dino Breeding farms must be supervised or Dinos soul-balled to avoid lag.

These are only the highlights of our rules. See detailed rules at #Rules on our Discord channel below. By continuing, you acknowledge you have read and understand all rules.

content.title: <TextStyle.White>Maps</>
content.text:
This Cluster is currently equipped with 8x Maps:
- Aberration
- Astraeos
- Extinction
- Ragnarok
- Scorched Earth
- The Center
- The Island
- Valguero

content.title: <TextStyle.Green>Auto-Decay System</>
content.text:
This cluster has auto-decay timers on all structures and tamed dinosaurs, currently aligned with Ark Official Rules:
- Thatch : 4 days
- Wood & Adobe : 8 Days
- Stone : 12 days
- Metal : 16 days
- Vault: 16 days
- Tek : 20-80 days

content.title: <TextStyle.Yellow>News</>
content.text:
- Scheduled daily restart at 05:00 - 06:00
- See #live-status Discord channel for server status
